basic_details.job_title: DLSA Jhabua Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Jhabua (DLSA Jhabua)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Jhabua (DLSA Jhabua) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Vehicle Driver Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 30-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: Not Specified Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, Valid Driving License, Driving Experience
qualification.details: 10th pass from a recognized institution. Valid Driving License. Experience in driving a vehicle. Preference will be given to candidates with vehicle mechanic experience.

selection_process: Scrutiny of Applications Interview Driving Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Jhabua Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://jhabua.dcourts.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Jhabua Vehicle Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DLSA Jhabua Vehicle Driver recruitment is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th standard from a recognized institution, possess a valid driving license, and have experience in driving vehicles. Preference is given to those with vehicle mechanic experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Vehicle Driver position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Vehicle Driver post will receive a salary of Rs. 12,000/- per month on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by DLSA Jhabua.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Vehicle Driver post is 18 years. The maximum age limit is not specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. How will the candidates be selected for the Vehicle Driver role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Vehicle Driver post includes the scrutiny of applications, followed by an interview and a driving test.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DLSA Jhabua Vehicle Driver recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the specified address.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates along with the application form.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DLSA Jhabua, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Vehicle Driver post is on a contractual basis.
